title: archidendron kunstleri subsp. ashtonii
intro: Archidendron kunstleri subsp. ashtonii is a sub-species of a plant belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the 'Borneo ironwood' due to its extremely hard wood. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Archidendron kunstleri subsp. ashtonii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and bark are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
